title: RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards

defines.name: RubricEM
defines.definition: A rubric-guided reinforcement learning framework that combines stagewise policy decomposition with reflection-based meta-policy training for deep research agents.

defines.name: Stage-Structured GRPO
defines.definition: A rubric-based credit assignment method that provides stage-specific feedback for long-horizon policy optimization.

defines.name: Reflection Meta-Policy
defines.definition: A shared-backbone policy that generates rubric-grounded reflections from judged trajectories and stores them as reusable memory.

problem: End-to-end reinforcement learning for deep research agents is hard because outputs lack verifiable ground truth, feedback is delayed and coarse over long tool-augmented trajectories, and judged attempts are not turned into reusable experience.
